spec_natural_language: function validateActionCreation MUST revert when caller is not the LlamaCore contract

violated_invariant.precondition: caller is not the LlamaCore contract
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: Only LlamaCore should be able to call validateActionCreation to set the action's approval and disapproval supply at creation time

extraction_reasoning: The finding explicitly states that validateActionCreation is external with no access control, allowing anyone to call it and update actionApprovalSupply/actionDisapprovalSupply mappings. The fix is clearly stated: restrict the function to only be callable by llamaCore. The invariant is unambiguous.
